text: The participant removes the blue ring from the wire structure using a supinated grip, then transfers it to the other hand. The ring is placed at the base of another wire structure on the left side of the screen using a pronated grip. The participant returns to the top of the dome to retrieve a second ring, using a supinated grip with the left hand.

The surgeon carefully navigates towards the screen right, holding the ring in a pronated position to optimize range of motion. The ring is placed back onto the wire structure, with slow and deliberate movements to avoid dislodging the loosely attached wire and minimize contact.
